name: acc-collab-runtime
description: Coordinate multi-agent work with ACC and run bounded Codex Ralph loops from a local plugin.

interface.shortDescription: Coordinate agents with ACC and run bounded Codex Ralph loops
interface.longDescription: Bring ACC-based multi-agent coordination into Codex with reusable skills, convenience commands, and a disciplined workflow for inbox sync, narrow file claims, lease renewal, explicit handoffs, and Ralph-style iterative Codex loops.
defaultPrompt: Use ACC Collaboration Runtime to coordinate this task with other agents: sync inbox, claim touched files, renew while working, and release with a concise handoff.
Use the Ralph loop commands when you want a bounded detached Codex exec loop with status, stop, and add-context controls.
